title: diasperus discolor
side_effects: Diasperus discolor can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, headaches, and dizziness in individuals who consume it in excessive amounts. Prolonged exposure to its extracts can also cause allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory issues in sensitive individuals. In some cases, improper use of the plant's compounds can lead to liver and kidney damage, as well as interact negatively with certain medications. Furthermore, it may exacerbate underlying health conditions, such as diabetes, high blood pressure, and cardiovascular disease.
